svg.title: Complete journey, all nine phases, connector line rerouted clear of the portal boxes
svg.desc: Same as before, with the egress storage to Knowledge Catalog arrow rerouted through the actual clear gap between the hot path column and the portal column, instead of cutting through portal/frontend.

g.text: same resource, not a new one
real time, shared by both flows

svg.text: PHASE 7 — HOT PATH, TWO ENTRY POINTS (continuous) · PHASE 8 — PORTAL, READ ONLY

g.text: home dashboard, search by id or name

svg.text: PHASE 9 — CONSUMER ACCESS (fed by Knowledge Catalog above)
gray = external · blue = Cloud Run, same subtitle = same service · purple = GCP Workflows
teal = GCP-managed infra · amber = new resource, created only per request, never speculatively
kafka, pub/sub, and REST grants write an access record back to Knowledge Catalog — direct access is already tracked there natively
